The '''Vua'spar interdictor''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]] equipped with multiple weapons and a full communications suite consisting of several [[villip]] choirs. They were spicular in shape and resembled two cones pushed together at the base. Where these cones meet, there were three large [[dovin basal]]s used to [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdict]] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel. They were almost as large as a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]].
